context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies the ecosystem selection framework: Homebrew cask for a macOS GUI app, mise for a CLI dev tool, and chezmoi externals for a single downloaded file.

checklist.name: Warp → Homebrew cask
checklist.description: Proposes adding Warp to packages.yaml under darwin.casks, NOT as a chezmoi external or mise tool

checklist.name: packages.yaml location
checklist.description: Homebrew change targets home/.chezmoidata/packages.yaml (not a new file)

checklist.name: yq → mise
checklist.description: Proposes adding yq to the mise config (e.g. as aqua:mikefarah/yq), NOT as a Homebrew brew or chezmoi external

checklist.name: bat theme → chezmoi externals
checklist.description: Proposes adding the bat theme file as a chezmoi external (type=file), NOT as a Homebrew package or mise tool

checklist.name: External file in .chezmoiexternals/
checklist.description: The chezmoi external for the bat theme is placed in home/.chezmoiexternals/bat.externals.toml (not home/.chezmoiexternal.toml)

checklist.name: Bat theme URL uses commit SHA
checklist.description: The URL for the bat theme file includes a commit SHA in the path (not a branch name like 'main')

checklist.name: Bat theme Renovate annotation
checklist.description: The bat theme external entry includes a `# renovate:` annotation

checklist.name: No execute commands
checklist.description: Does NOT propose running brew install, mise use, or chezmoi apply as immediate actions — only as optional next steps

checklist.name: chezmoi diff mentioned
checklist.description: Includes `chezmoi diff` as a verification step
